"Notes: All figures are estimates based on samples--money amounts are in thousands of dollars. * Estimate should be used with caution because of the small number of sample returns on which it is based. d - To avoid disclosure of information for specific corporations, these data have been deleted. Data are included in appropriate totals. Detail may not add to total because of rounding.  See ""Explanation of Terms"" and ""Description of the Sample and Limitations of the Data."" Source: IRS, Statistics of Income Division: 2022 Publication 16, September 2025."
